description_long: This is a simple, square-topped stool with a flat, light-colored wooden seat and four slender, straight legs. The legs are angled slightly outward for stability and are painted a contrasting red, giving the stool a playful yet functional appearance. The seat has softly rounded corners, enhancing comfort and safety. There are no visible backrests, footrests, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian and minimalist design. The stool appears lightweight and portable, suitable for use in public spaces such as parks, bus stops, or urban plazas. Its construction suggests durability for frequent use in high-traffic urban environments.
description: A minimalist stool with a light wooden square seat and four red, outward-angled legs. The design is simple, functional, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat square seat and two visible red legs.
description_view_1: Side view with the seat and two legs visible, highlighting the outward angle of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the seat and two legs visible, showing the same structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the seat and two legs, mirroring view 1.
